view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6
view.subtitle: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied due to insufficient evidence of bookings meeting the minimum requirement.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied due to insufficient evidence of bookings meeting the minimum requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied due to insufficient evidence of bookings meeting the minimum requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Guide assignment' within the context of the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only 2 bookings were confirmed, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants needed to run the tour. This directly leads to a gap in the requirement coverage, as the tour cannot proceed without sufficient participants to assign a guide effectively.
